vibe: Clean, professional, modern like Uber/Amazon, mobile-first

global_rules.testing_attributes: Add testID to all interactive elements (e.g. testID='login-button')

spacing_system.rules: Use exactly these values. Do not invent 10px or 15px. App padding horizontal is 16px.

rtl_guidelines.flex: Use standard flex-direction row (React Native flips it automatically if I18nManager.isRTL is true).
rtl_guidelines.padding_margin: CRITICAL: Use paddingHorizontal, paddingStart, paddingEnd, marginStart, marginEnd instead of left/right to ensure RTL compatibility.

screens.Login_Register: Clean form, large inputs (48px height), prominent CTA, 'Forgot Password' link, social login buttons.
screens.Home: Header with user location/greeting. Search bar. 3 horizontal scrollable sections: 'Companies' (large cards), 'Workshops' (medium cards), 'Products' (grid or scrollable list).
screens.Company_Profile: Cover image, logo overlap. Details section. List of services offered by company, Ratings, Location map snippet.
screens.Workshop_Profile: Similar to Company but with 'Book Now' sticky footer CTA. Address, Reviews, Services list.
screens.Product_Details: Large image gallery (swiper). Title, Price, Specs list. Sticky footer with 'Add to Cart' and quantity selector.
screens.Services_List: Vertical list of service cards. Filter/Sort pills at top.
screens.Booking_Page: Step-by-step or single scroll form: Select vehicle, Select Service, Date/Time picker (horizontal slots), Confirm CTA.
screens.Cart_Orders: Top tabs: Cart (items with +/- qty), Active Orders, Order History. Cart has checkout summary at bottom.
screens.Notifications: Simple list of unread (highlighted bg) and read notifications. Icon + Text + Time.
screens.User_Profile: Avatar, Name. Vertical menu items: My Orders, My Bookings, Addresses, Settings, Logout. Simple 1px borders between items.

components.CompanyCard: Horizontal layout. Image left (or right in RTL), Title, Rating, Category tag.
components.WorkshopCard: Square layout. Image top, Title, Location, Rating.
components.ProductCard: Vertical. Image top, Title (2 lines max), Price, Add icon.
components.ServiceCard: Row layout. Icon, Service Name, Price range, Chevron.

instructions_to_main_agent: Focus heavily on RTL text alignment (text-align: right) and paddingStart/marginEnd properties.
Build as a React Native Expo application. Use pure StyleSheet for styling, do not use Tailwind unless NativeWind is pre-installed.
Create 10 functional screens with navigation (React Navigation).
Keep styling ultra clean: use #0A0A0A for primary buttons and #0066FF for links/accents.
